title: Ratio Map Playground
summary: A clean smart-resize shell where one Sites door and one Manager pane teach focus through a labeled ratio gauge.

title: Rail Smart Resize
summary: A quiet two-door rail opens one corporate secondary surface while a visible ratio gauge shifts weight between tools and the live site.

title: Material Depth Console

title: Resize Gauge Playground
summary: A mono smart-resize shell where the seam teaches iframe, split, pane, and preview focus ratios.
